message:
feat(fj-api): add value_and_grad e2e, jacobian, hessian, and error-path tests for transforms

Adds execution-level tests for value_and_grad (traced x*x round-trip,
hardened mode, backend/defaults), jacobian single-output, hessian
quadratic, wrong-arity error paths for jit/grad, and empty-compose
identity semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
